creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
just got another....

Subject: [package - 114i386-default][x11-themes/kde-icons-black-and-white] Failed for kde-icons-black-and-white-2.0.a in fetch

Date: Sat, 10 Jul 2021 09:17:56 GMT

===>  License theme theme accepted by the user
=> black%20and%20white.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /portdistfiles/KDE.
=> Attempting to fetch http://mirror.amdmi3.ru/distfiles/KDE/black%20and%20white.tar.gz
673225192:error:1407742E:SSL routines:SSL23_GET_SERVER_HELLO:tlsv1 alert protocol version:/usr/src/crypto/openssl/ssl/s23_clnt.c:802:
fetch: http://mirror.amdmi3.ru/distfiles/KDE/black%20and%20white.tar.gz: Authentication error
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/KDE/black%20and%20white.tar.gz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/KDE/black%20and%20white.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /portdistfiles/KDE and try again.
*** Error code 1


I'm not trying to spam the pr logs here. Just attempting to
indicate that this apprears to happen for all attempts the
package builders make to build this port.

I'll stop now. :-)

--Chris
